'''Pil Diller''' was a forested [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. According to records, this planet was once home to the extinct [[singing fig tree]]s.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] places Pil Diller in the ''Quelli'' sector, a misspelling of the true Quelii sector.
